Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared via zoom for and with Gloria Gee (petitioner).
Gilbert Jay appeared via zoom for respondents.

Discussion was held regarding the procedural defects, that Mr. Jay will be filing a verification, and that parties are not ready to mediate this matter because counsel needs time to conduct depositions.

The matter is continued to June 22, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.


Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
